reachability_artifacts: built sworn serve process output showing the C-06/C-08 effective loopback URL, schema-valid /api/v1 snapshot, SSE event/resume, SIGTERM shutdown, and exit code
live HTTP capture showing malformed/unreadable state returns typed non-2xx rather than an empty healthy board
C-08 unsafe-bind and mutation-method capture showing non-loopback listen and unguarded writes are rejected before reaching an operation

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; implementer must confirm source query ownership, SSE backpressure, and server lifecycle before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator can trust a recoverable autonomous release loop, receive durable attention pages, and monitor or safely control it from a mobile web board.

positive_scenarios: A localhost client reads authoritative release, operation, event, blocker, and notification state.
An SSE client reconnects from its last event sequence without duplicating acknowledged events.
SIGTERM drains active requests and stops the server cleanly.
negative_scenarios: Unreadable state never appears as a healthy empty board.
A stalled stream cannot block event persistence or other clients.
Non-loopback serving is unavailable without valid authentication configuration.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: One truthful read API gives the mobile board and every future observer the same state while making degraded sources visible instead of optimistic.

design_decisions.choice: Use versioned REST JSON reads plus Server-Sent Events over the shared operation query service.
design_decisions.rationale: The operations plane is server-to-client dominant, SSE resumes by sequence, and both protocols fit standard-library single-binary delivery and ordinary mobile browsers.

design_decisions.choice: Serve read-only data on loopback by default and make remote bind contingent on the S11 authentication configuration.
options: loopback default with guarded remote bind
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified 2026-07-14 (D4): secure self-hosting remains supported and loopback is the local default; optional hosted access uses an authenticated outbound agent transport.
design_decisions.rationale: The useful local board ships first without silently exposing repository state.

design_decisions.choice: Return typed degraded states instead of empty fallback projections.
design_decisions.rationale: A monitoring board is dangerous if source failure looks like no work and no blockers.
